title: The Memory Stone
description: Learn how to store and use data with variables - the foundation of all programming.

phases.title: What Are Variables?
phases.description: Learn what variables are and why they're important

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Hey Qubit! Today I'm going to teach you something really important - variables!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Think of a variable like a labeled box where you can store things. You give it a name, and put a value inside it!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: For example, if you want to remember how many crops you've harvested, you can store that number in a variable.

phases.title: Creating Your First Variable
phases.description: Learn how to create a variable

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: To create a variable, you use the equals sign (=). Try typing: crop_count = 0

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: This creates a variable named 'crop_count' and stores the number 0 in it.

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Perfect! You just created your first variable! The name is 'crop_count' and it holds the value 0.

phases.title: Updating a Variable
phases.description: Learn how to change a variable's value

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now here's the cool part - you can change what's inside a variable!

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: This takes the current value (0), adds 1 to it, and stores the result (1) back in crop_count.

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: So now crop_count is 1 instead of 0?

phases.title: Using Variables
phases.description: Learn how to use variables in your code

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: You can use variables anywhere you'd use a value. Let's print our crop count!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Great! When you run this, it will show the value stored in crop_count!

phases.title: Run Your Code
phases.description: Execute your code to see variables in action

preDialogues.name: Maru
preDialogues.content: Now click the play button to run your code and see your variable in action!

objectives.description: Click the play button to run your code

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Awesome! You've learned how to create, update, and use variables!

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: This is actually pretty useful. I can keep track of things now!

postDialogues.name: Maru
postDialogues.content: Exactly! Variables are the memory of your program. Let's learn more about different types of variables!
